title: Ashen Armors and Tools Standalone
description: A small 16x pack adding standalone versions of Ashen's armors and tools for use with other packs.
body:
![About](https://i.imgur.com/nMG1TNv.png)

Do you want to use Ashen's Armor textures (and maybe even its Tools) with other, unrelated resource packs?

Then this pack is for you! This pack comes in two versions -- the first adds both Armor and Weapon textures from Ashen, and the second adds _only_ the armor sprites

Place this pack *above* the pack you're trying to replace in your load order.
___

This pack is designed to stand alone and integrate with other resource packs, but I cannot provide support for non-Ashen packs.
___

[![Bisect Banner](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/3c357293-8dfb-410a-a5e3-0d778833e154.webp)](https://bisecthosting.com/aim-boot)
